features.name: Ads
features.discription: The script inserts advertisements on pages the user visits.

features.name: Memberships
features.discription: The script requires the user to subscribe to a channel, join a group, like a page, etc. for the script to be fully functional.

features.name: Miner
features.discription: The script contains a cryptominer or other code that uses the user's resources to perform some task for the script author.

features.name: Payment
features.discription: The script requires the user pay the script author for the script to be fully functional.

features.name: Referral Link
features.discription: The script performs some action that earns the author commission on purchases. This includes the script containing referral/affiliate links, rewriting existing links to be referral/affiliate links, or providing coupon codes that earn the script author commission.

features.name: Tracking
features.discription: The script includes code to track user activity. This includes trackers such as Google Analytics or custom tracking code that reports user activity to the script author.
